Our Offices

Clinical Research Office

MENU

The Clinical Research Office carries out the operation processes of clinical research studies in our Istanbul Okan University Hospital and provides the link between companies and physicians-hospital-university. It realizes administrative and financial coordination by working in constant communication with our physicians and hospital internal stakeholders in many subjects and scopes such as pharmaceuticals, medical devices, observational studies, retrospective studies in our hospital.
